name: George Schuller
abstract: George Schuller (born December 29, 1958) is an American jazz drummer. He is the son of composer Gunther Schuller.

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Varner
about_quotes.evidence: I was in touch with maybe you’ve interviewed or for other projects George Schuller, his son, who is a great drummer and is also a kind of a keeper of the flame of the information of the Lenox jazz school
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Varner interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 13, 2025
